title: Mediterranean Chicken Falafel Wrap
description: A flavorful wrap filled with crispy falafel, juicy chicken, and crunchy vegetables, all wrapped in a warm pita.
instructions: In a large bowl, whisk together lemon juice, olive oil, salt, black pepper, and crushed red pepper flakes. Add the chicken and marinate for at least 30 minutes.
Remove chicken from marinade and bake for 20-25 minutes, or until cooked through.
In a large skillet, heat 1 tablespoon of olive oil over medium-high heat. Add the falafel and cook until crispy, about 3-4 minutes per side.
Warm the pita bread in the oven for 5 minutes.
Assemble the wrap by spreading a layer of feta cheese on the pita, followed by a layer of bitter greens, a few pieces of falafel, and a few slices of cooked chicken.
Drizzle with additional lemon juice and olive oil, if desired.
